coverage_gaps: Cross-pollination-positive cases are not guaranteed by this supplier slice.
Brand diversity is limited: supplier input is Honeywell-only.

false_keep_numeric_pn.definition: Numeric/dotted/leading-zero PN cases with photo verdict KEEP but non-AUTO_PUBLISH card outcome.

false_public_price_count.definition: Bundles with raw public_price but non-ACCEPTED v2 price field status.

safe_cache_fallback_reuse_count.definition: SKUs where transient deterministic price extraction failure reused prior admissible exact-product price evidence from bounded-run cache.

explicit_no_price_coverage_count.definition: No-price/hidden-price bundles where deterministic upstream source or page lineage was still materialized explicitly.

exact_product_lineage_confirmed_count.definition: No-price/source-seen bundles where pre-LLM exact-product lineage was confirmed deterministically from structured page evidence.

admissible_source_replacement_confirmed_.definition: Weak exact-lineage no-price bundles where a higher-tier admissible exact-product replacement source was confirmed deterministically.

terminal_weak_lineage_count.definition: Weak exact-lineage no-price bundles with no admissible replacement confirmed in the bounded candidate surface.

source_surface_preserved_count.definition: Bundles where compatible no-price source surface was preserved explicitly from a prior bounded run because the current run dropped it.

source_surface_drop_detected_count.definition: Bundles where current-run no-price source surface dropped relative to compatible prior bounded evidence.

source_surface_conflict_count.definition: Bundles where current-run no-price source surface conflicts with compatible prior bounded evidence and was not preserved silently.

reviewable_no_price_candidate_count.definition: No-price exact-product pages with clean admissible lineage that may be considered for future deterministic review-routing.

remaining_no_price_family_count.definition: DRAFT_ONLY bundles still blocked by terminal or generic no-price evidence failure on the authoritative v2 path.

remaining_ambiguous_tail_count.definition: DRAFT_ONLY no-price bundles that are neither terminal weak lineage nor reviewable no-price candidates after the current deterministic classification pass.

first_run_tail: Вердикт: KEEP (artifact_cache sha1=324da367) — На изображении видны противошумные наушники Honeywell на каске, товар угадывается.
Вердикт: REJECT (gpt_cache) — на изображении выключатель, а не датчик температуры

blocking_issues: DRAFT_ONLY share is still high for a broader controlled run.
non_blocking_issues: PDF coverage remains incomplete and needs better datasheet hit-rate before scaling.
